### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Configuration](Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Configuration.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Client\.Configuration')

## EventStoreDomainOptions Class

Per\-domain configuration options for event store resource naming\.
Used in the five\-layer cascading configuration system where each layer can override
individual properties\. A `null` value means "not set at this layer — use value from previous layer\."

```csharp
public class EventStoreDomainOptions
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; EventStoreDomainOptions

### Remarks

The cascade resolution applies layers in priority order (lowest to highest):
1. Layer 1 — Convention defaults (from `NamingConventionEngine`)
2. Layer 2 — Global code options (from `EventStoreOptions`)
3. Layer 3 — Domain self-config (`OnConfiguring()` override)
4. Layer 4 — External config (`appsettings.json`)
5. Layer 5 — Explicit override (`ConfigureDomain()` callback)

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Client.Configuration.EventStoreDomainOptions.DeadLetterTopicPattern'></a>

## EventStoreDomainOptions\.DeadLetterTopicPattern Property

Gets or sets the dead\-letter topic pattern for this domain\.
When `null`, the convention default is used \(e\.g\., `deadletter.{domain}.events`\)\.

```csharp
public string? DeadLetterTopicPattern { get; set; }
```

## EventStoreDomainOptions\.StateStoreName Property

Gets or sets the DAPR state store name for this domain\.
When `null`, the convention default is used \(e\.g\., `{domain}-eventstore`\)\.
